news.t: VegaShares Announces Launch of Autocallable Income ETF (VAIE)

overview.description: The VegaShares US Equity Autocallable Income ETF (VAIE) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in income alternatives. The fund is an actively managed ETF aiming to provide income with reduced downside risk. The ETF uses derivatives to create a theoretically laddered portfolio of autocallable contracts. VAIE was launched on May 12, 2026 and is issued by Vegashares.

data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--VegaShares launches Autocallable Income ETF.
